payload.body: Addressing reviewer comments 1 and 2: state boundary conditions in the introduction and add the two missing citations.
payload.diff:
--- a/sections/intro.tex
+++ b/sections/intro.tex
@@ -3,6 +3,9 @@
 In this paper we study the two-point function of the inflaton field
 in T3FT cosmology.
+
+We assume periodic boundary conditions on the spatial three-torus and
+impose the standard Bunch-Davies vacuum on the inflaton mode functions.
 
--- a/sections/related.tex
+++ b/sections/related.tex
@@ -12,4 +12,6 @@
 Several authors have considered analogous quantities in the FRW setting.
+\cite{bardeen1986cosmological}
+\cite{bond1983large}
